text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Under a beautiful, sunny sky, the BNW trio once
again steps onto the track.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's just as I calculated! Now, at the next corner—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh! DEEERBYYY!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, the Derby's been over for ages.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but that doesn't change the fact that the
Derby was my dream race!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Besides, yelling it out gives me so much energyyy!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm, so vocalizing your aspirations can help
improve your motivation and physical abilities?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I think I'll put that to the test.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If what Ticket says is true, then there's ample
reason to try it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian said it's not like me to keep losing races, so
I have to do something to end my losing streak.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit, Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin might've won the Arima Kinen, but she
won't be so lucky next time!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The real race between us is just getting started!
Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch. That Ticket never changes.
choice_data_list: You look like you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? In what way?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ever since that race, they've been pestering me to
run with them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Whatever. It's good training, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her harsh words, Narita Taishin's
expression is pleasant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series may be over, but it seems her
two rivals continue to be a good influence on her
as dear friends.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well? What race am I entering next?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Give me your best shot. I'll win whatever it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's path continues onward—now and
forever.
